_schema_meta.source_document: Policy Schedule — Badal Satapathy — Period 05/02/2026 to 04/02/2027
_schema_meta.notes: User-specific schedule data only. Product rules are in product_library_hdfc_optima_secure.json. Derived insights are computed at runtime by the Ezer Insight Engine by joining this file with the product library.

sum_insured.plus_benefit_note: 10+ years continuous coverage — Plus Benefit has reached 100% maximum. No further growth possible.
sum_insured.per_claim_ceiling_note: With Unlimited Restore active, SI is restored unlimited times. Single claim cannot exceed Base SI + Plus Benefit + Secure Benefit per policy wording.
sum_insured.effective_annual_coverage_note: ₹25L base + ₹25L Secure Benefit + unlimited Restore of ₹25L each time = effectively uncapped for multiple admissions

waiting_periods.overall_status: partial — ₹10L block fully waived, two ₹5L blocks have running waiting periods
waiting_periods.source: Renewal Continuity Benefits table, Page 2 of policy schedule

special_conditions.note: No declared PEDs or special exclusions on Badal's schedule. Either no PEDs declared or none accepted as material. Verify against original proposal form.

addons.protect_benefit_note: Protect Benefit is DEFAULT ON for Optima Secure per Annexure C. Not explicitly removed — therefore active.

schedule_of_benefits.restore_benefit: 100% of base SI — unlimited times with Unlimited Restore add-on active
schedule_of_benefits.plus_benefit: 50% of base SI per renewal irrespective of claims, maximum 100%
schedule_of_benefits.secure_benefit: 100% of base SI as additional pool
schedule_of_benefits.protect_benefit: Annexure B non-medical expenses covered upto SI — DEFAULT ON
